items.title: France braces for another day of sweltering heat as Europe heatwave spreads
items.summary: The heatwave is expected to spread to other parts of western Europe on Wednesday, before extending eastwards over the weekend.

items.title: Congress passes war powers measure for first time, breaking with Trump over Iran
items.summary: The resolution passed on Tuesday was largely symbolic, but it adds to pressure on the White House to end the conflict once and for all.

items.title: UN says it will evacuate sailors stranded in Strait of Hormuz, as Rubio warns against tolls
items.summary: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned Iran that no country can charge fees for ships to travel through the strait.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.
